errors.excerpt: Let $A \subseteq B \subseteq \mathbb{R}$. If $u$ is an upper bound of $B$, then $u$ is an upper bound of $A$.

errors.title: Supremum Is Monotone Under Inclusion
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A$ and $B$ be non-empty subsets of $\mathbb{R}$ that are bounded above. If $A \subseteq B$, then $\sup A \le \sup B$.

errors.title: Upper Bound Comparison with the Supremum
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $s = \sup A$. For any $u \in \mathbb{R}$, $u$ is an upper bound of $A$ if and only if $s \le u$.

errors.title: Every Element Lies Below the Supremum
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: If $s = \sup A$, then for every $x \in A$, $x \le s$.

errors.title: Infimum Is Less Than or Equal to the Supremum
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: For any non-empty bounded set $A \subseteq \mathbb{R}$, $\inf A \le \sup A$.

errors.title: Order Comparison of Suprema
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A, B \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be non-empty and bounded above. If for every $x \in A$ there exists $y \in B$ such that $x \le y$, then $\sup A \le \sup B$.

errors.title: Translation Invariance of the Supremum
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be a non-empty set bounded above, and let $c \in \mathbb{R}$. Define the translated set $A + c = \{a + c : a \in A\}$. Then $\sup(A + c) = \sup A + c$.

errors.title: Scalar Multiplication by a Positive Scalar
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be a non-empty set bounded above, and let $k \in \mathbb{R}$ such that $k > 0$. Define the scaled set $kA = \{ka : a \in A\}$. Then $\sup(kA) = k \sup A$.

errors.title: Scalar Multiplication by a Negative Scalar
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be a non-empty set bounded below, and let $k \in \mathbb{R}$ such that $k < 0$. Define the scaled set $kA = \{ka : a \in A\}$. Then $\sup(kA) = k \inf A$.

errors.title: Negation Exchanges Supremum and Infimum
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be a non-empty set. If $A$ is bounded below, then the set $-A = \{-a : a \in A\}$ is bounded above and $\sup(-A) = -\inf A$.

errors.title: Supremum of a Sum Set
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A, B \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be non-empty sets bounded above. Define the Minkowski sum $A + B = \{a + b : a \in A, b \in B\}$. Then $\sup(A + B) = \sup A + \sup B$.

errors.title: Supremum of a Difference Set
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A, B \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be non-empty sets such that $A$ is bounded above and $B$ is bounded below. Define $A - B = \{a - b : a \in A, b \in B\}$. Then $\sup(A - B) = \sup A - \inf B$.

errors.title: Supremum of a Dilation
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be a non-empty bounded set and let $\lambda \in \mathbb{R}$. The dilation $\lambda A$ satisfies $\sup(\lambda A) = \max\{\lambda \sup A, \lambda \inf A\}$.

errors.title: Supremum of the Absolute-Value Image
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be a non-empty bounded set. Define $|A| = \{|a| : a \in A\}$. Then $\sup |A| = \max\{|\sup A|, |\inf A|\}$.

errors.title: Bounds for Suprema and Infima Under Set Addition
errors.message: Extracted theorem/definition item has no attached Dependencies remark. Extraction was preserved, but the source should include explicit dependency hyperrefs or 'No local dependencies.' for reliable graph generation.
errors.excerpt: Let $A, B \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ be non-empty bounded sets. For the sum set $A+B$, the following inequalities hold: $\inf A + \inf B \le \inf(A + B)$ and $\sup(A + B) \le \sup A + \sup B$.

errors.label: def:epsilon-characterization-of-supremum
errors.excerpt: Let $A \subseteq \mathbb{R}$ and let $s \in \mathbb{R}$. The element $s$ is said to satisfy the \emph{epsilon characterization of the supremum of $A$} if $s$ is an upper bound of $A$ and for every $\varepsilon > 0$ there exists $a \in A$ such that \[ s-\varepsilon < a. \]
